queries.name: AgeGroupCountPurokQry
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between 0 and 5, "0 - 5 Years Old", [Age] Between 6 and 12, "06 - 12 Years Old", [Age] Between 13 and 17, "13 - 17 Years Old", [Age] Between 18 and 35, "18 - 35 Years Old", [Age] Between 36 and 50, "36 - 50 Years Old", [Age] Between 51 and 59, "51 - 59 Years Old", [Age] >= 60, "Above 60") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers WHERE Purok = TempVars!strPurok)  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: AgeGroupCountQry
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between 0 and 5, "0 - 5 Years Old", [Age] Between 6 and 12, "06 - 12 Years Old", [Age] Between 13 and 17, "13 - 17 Years Old", [Age] Between 18 and 35, "18 - 35 Years Old", [Age] Between 36 and 50, "36 - 50 Years Old", [Age] Between 51 and 59, "51 - 59 Years Old", [Age] >= 60, "Above 60") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DateofBirth],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DateofBirth],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers)  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: AgeGroupCountQry1
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between 0 and 5, "0 - 5 Years Old", [Age] Between 6 and 12, "06 - 12 Years Old", [Age] Between 13 and 17, "13 - 17 Years Old", [Age] Between 18 and 35, "18 - 35 Years Old", [Age] Between 36 and 50, "36 - 50 Years Old", [Age] Between 51 and 59, "51 - 59 Years Old", [Age] >= 60, "Above 60") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DateofBirth],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DateofBirth],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers WHERE Purok = Forms![Household Menu]![Combo37])  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: AgeRangeCountPurok1Qry
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  and Forms![Household Menu]![Text48],  Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  & " - "  & Forms![Household Menu]![Text48] & " Years Old") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DateofBirth],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DateofBirth],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers WHERE Purok = Forms![Household Menu]![Combo44])  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: AgeRangeCountPurokQry
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  and Forms![Household Menu]![Text48],  Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  & " - "  & Forms![Household Menu]![Text48] & " Years Old") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DateofBirth],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DateofBirth],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers WHERE Purok = Forms![Household Menu]![Combo44])  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: AgeRangeCountQry
queries.sql:
SELECT [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup, Count(*) AS Total
FROM [SELECT Switch( [Age] Between Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  and Forms![Household Menu]![Text48],  Forms![Household Menu]![Text46]  & " - "  & Forms![Household Menu]![Text48] & " Years Old") AS AgeGroup FROM (SELECT DateDiff("yyyy",[DateofBirth],Date())-IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DateofBirth],"mmdd"),1,0) AS Age FROM HouseholdMembers)  AS [%$##@_Alias]]. AS [%$##@_Alias]
GROUP BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup
ORDER BY [%$##@_Alias].AgeGroup;

queries.name: BCFee Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BCFee.[Seq], BCFee.[ID], BCFee.[ApplyDate], BCFee.[LastName], BCFee.[FirstName], BCFee.[MI], BCFee.[ResCertNo], BCFee.[PlaceOfIssue], BCFee.[DateOfIssue], BCFee.[ORNumber], BCFee.[Amount]
FROM BCFee;

queries.name: BloodType Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.BLOODTYPE, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.BLOODTYPE)=[TempVars]![strBloodTypeSelected]))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname;

queries.name: BrgyBusClearancePermit Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BrgyBusClearancePermit.BarangayId, BrgyBusClearancePermit.BusYear, BrgyBusClearancePermit.FullName, BrgyBusClearancePermit.TradeName, BrgyBusClearancePermit.LineOfBusiness, BrgyBusClearancePermit.BusAddress, BrgyBusClearancePermit.GrossSales, BrgyBusClearancePermit.TypeOfClearance, BrgyBusClearancePermit.IssueDateClearancePermit, BrgyBusClearancePermit.ORNo, BrgyBusClearancePermit.ORDate, BrgyBusClearancePermit.BPFees, BrgyBusClearancePermit.DocStampAmt
FROM BrgyBusClearancePermit;

queries.name: BrgyBusClearancePermitbyPurok Query
BrgyBusinessRecords Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BrgyBusinessRecords.BarangayBusId, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusinessYearOpened, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusFullName, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusShortName, BrgyBusinessRecords.PurokCode, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusAddress, BrgyBusinessRecords.OwnerName, BrgyBusinessRecords.TypeOfBusiness, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusinessNature, BrgyBusinessRecords.LineOfBusiness, Nature.natureName
FROM BrgyBusinessRecords INNER JOIN Nature ON BrgyBusinessRecords.BusinessNature = Nature.naturecode;

queries.name: BrgyBusinessRecords Query1
queries.sql:
SELECT BrgyBusinessRecords.BarangayBusId, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusinessYearOpened, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusFullName, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusShortName, BrgyBusinessRecords.PurokCode, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusAddress, BrgyBusinessRecords.OwnerName, BrgyBusinessRecords.TypeOfBusiness, BrgyBusinessRecords.BusinessNature, BrgyBusinessRecords.LineOfBusiness
FROM BrgyBusinessRecords;

queries.name: BrgyOfficers Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BrgyOfficers.[OfficerID], BrgyOfficers.[OfficerName], BrgyOfficers.[OfficerTitle]
FROM BrgyOfficers;

queries.name: BTCFee Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BTCFee.Seq, BTCFee.BrgyBusinessId, BTCFee.ApplyDate, BTCFee.BusinessFullName, BTCFee.BusinessShortName, BTCFee.ResCertNo, BTCFee.PlaceOfIssue, BTCFee.DateOfIssue, BTCFee.ORNumber, BTCFee.Amount
FROM BTCFee;

queries.name: BTCFee Query1
queries.sql:
SELECT BTCFee.[Seq], BTCFee.[BrgyBusinessId], BTCFee.[ApplyDate], BTCFee.[BusinessFullName], BTCFee.[BusinessShortName], BTCFee.[ResCertNo], BTCFee.[PlaceOfIssue], BTCFee.[DateOfIssue], BTCFee.[ORNumber], BTCFee.[Amount]
FROM BTCFee;

queries.name: BusinessRecords Query
ClearancePermitSum Query
queries.sql:
SELECT BrgyBusClearancePermit.[BusYear], BrgyBusClearancePermit.[LineOfBusiness], Count(BrgyBusClearancePermit.LineOfBusiness) AS CountOfLineOfBusiness
FROM BrgyBusClearancePermit
GROUP BY BrgyBusClearancePermit.[BusYear], BrgyBusClearancePermit.[LineOfBusiness]
ORDER BY BrgyBusClearancePermit.[LineOfBusiness];

queries.name: GetBirthday Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.SITIO, HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((Month([DATEOFBIRTH]))=Month(Now())) AND ((Day([DATEOFBIRTH]))=Day(Now())))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.SITIO, HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.HseNum;

queries.name: HouseholdMain Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMain.[HouseholdNo], HouseholdMain.[DateofVisit], HouseholdMain.[ResLastName], HouseholdMain.[ResFirstName], HouseholdMain.[ResMI], HouseholdMain.[Birthday], HouseholdMain.[Sex], HouseholdMain.[NHTSClass], HouseholdMain.[IPClass], HouseholdMain.[PhilhealthMember], HouseholdMain.[PHIDNo], HouseholdMain.[Purok]
FROM HouseholdMain;

queries.name: HouseholdMain Query1
queries.sql:
UPDATE HouseholdMain INNER JOIN HouseholdMembers ON HouseholdMain.HseNum = HouseholdMembers.HseNum
SET HouseholdMain.[SITIO] = "PILIPOG", HouseholdMain.[PUROK] = [HouseholdMembers]![PUROK];

queries.name: HouseholdMainQuery
HouseholdMainResidence Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMain.[HOUSESTATUS], Count(HouseholdMain.HOUSESTATUS) AS CountOfHOUSESTATUS
FROM HouseholdMain
GROUP BY HouseholdMain.[HOUSESTATUS]
HAVING (((HouseholdMain.[HOUSESTATUS]) Is Not Null));

queries.name: HouseholdMainSummary Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMain.[WATERSOURCE], Count(HouseholdMain.WATERSOURCE) AS CountOfWATERSOURCE
FROM HouseholdMain
GROUP BY HouseholdMain.[WATERSOURCE]
HAVING (((HouseholdMain.[WATERSOURCE]) Is Not Null));

queries.name: HouseholdMainToilet Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMain.[TOILET_Y/N], Count(HouseholdMain.[TOILET_Y/N]) AS [CountOfTOILET_Y/N]
FROM HouseholdMain
GROUP BY HouseholdMain.[TOILET_Y/N]
HAVING (((HouseholdMain.[TOILET_Y/N]) Is Not Null));

queries.name: HouseholdMainToiletCommunal Query
queries.sql: SELECT ;

queries.name: ~sq_fNature
queries.sql:
SELECT DISTINCTROW *
FROM Nature;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.[HouseholdNo] AS Expr1, HouseholdMembers.[HouseholdMemLastName] AS Expr2, HouseholdMembers.[HouseholdMemFirstName] AS Expr3, HouseholdMembers.[HouseholdMemMI] AS Expr4, HouseholdMembers.[Birthday] AS Expr5, HouseholdMembers.[Gender] AS Expr6
FROM HouseholdMembers;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query1
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH) Is Null))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query2
HouseholdMembers Query3
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.Occupation, Count(HouseholdMembers.Occupation) AS CountOfOccupation
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.HouseholdNo) Between [Forms]![Household Menu]![Text19] And [Forms]![Household Menu]![Text21]))
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.Occupation
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.Occupation;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query4
HouseholdMembers Query5
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.Occupation, Count(HouseholdMembers.Occupation) AS CountOfOccupation, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.Occupation, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=[TempVars]![strSitioName]));

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query6
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.[DC], HouseholdMembers.[PUROK], Max(HouseholdMembers.[HseNum]) AS MaxOfHseNum
FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.[DC], HouseholdMembers.[PUROK]
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.[PUROK])="Leon Kilat"));

queries.name: HouseholdMembers Query7
HouseholdMembers Query8
HouseholdMembers Query9
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.[Id], HouseholdMembers.[SITIO], HouseholdMembers.[PUROK]
FROM HouseholdMembers;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers0to5 Query
HouseholdMembers0to5Purok Query
HouseholdMembers13_17 Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())) AS AgeBracket, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now()))) Between 13 And 17))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers13_17Purok Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())) AS AgeBracket, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=TempVars!strPurok) And ((IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now()))) Between 13 And 17))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers18_35 Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())) AS AgeBracket, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now()))) Between 18 And 35))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname;

queries.name: HouseholdMembers18_35Purok Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())) AS AgeBracket, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=TempVars!strPurok) And ((IIf(Format(Date(),"mmdd")<Format([DATEOFBIRTH],"mmdd"),DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now()))) Between 18 And 35))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname;

HouseholdMembersHealth Query
HouseholdMembersHealthPurok Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.BLOODTYPE, Count(HouseholdMembers.BLOODTYPE) AS CountOfHealthStatus, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.BLOODTYPE, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=[TempVars]![strPurokName]));

queries.name: HouseholdMembersIllness Query
HouseholdMembersIllnessPurok Query
queries.sql:

FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.ILLNESS, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=[TempVars]![strPurokName]));

queries.name: HouseholdMembersNoBirthday Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=TempVars!strPurok) And ((HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH) Is Null))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.lastname;

queries.sql:

FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.[PWD]
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.[PWD])="x"));

queries.name: HouseholdMembersSAPDetail Query
HouseholdMembersSexF Query
queries.sql:
SELECT Count(*) AS N, [HouseholdMembersSexM Query].M
FROM [SELECT Sex, Purok FROM HouseholdMembers]. AS T, [HouseholdMembersSexM Query]
WHERE (((T.Sex)="F"))
GROUP BY [HouseholdMembersSexM Query].M;

queries.name: HouseholdMembersSexFPurok Query
queries.sql:
SELECT Count(*) AS N, [HouseholdMembersSexMPurok Query].M
FROM [SELECT Sex, Purok FROM HouseholdMembers]. AS T, [HouseholdMembersSexMPurok Query]
WHERE (((T.Purok)=TempVars!StrSitioName) And ((T.Sex)="F"))
GROUP BY [HouseholdMembersSexMPurok Query].M;

queries.name: HouseholdMembersSexM Query
HouseholdMembersSexMPurok Query
HouseholdMembersSpecificAge Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.DC, HouseholdMembers.PUROK, HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.HseNumSuf, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX, IIf(Now()<DateSerial(Year(Now()),Month([DATEOFBIRTH]),Day([DATEOFBIRTH])),(DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now()))-1,DateDiff("yyyy",[DATEOFBIRTH],Now())) AS Age
FROM HouseholdMembers;

queries.name: HouseholdMembersUCT Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.[UCT], Count(HouseholdMembers.UCT) AS CountOfUCT
FROM HouseholdMembers
GROUP BY HouseholdMembers.[UCT]
HAVING (((HouseholdMembers.[UCT])="x"));

queries.name: HouseholdMembersUCTDetail Query
HOUSEHOLDQRY
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMain.*, HouseholdMembers.*
FROM HouseholdMain INNER JOIN HouseholdMembers ON HouseholdMain.HouseholdNo = HouseholdMembers.HouseholdNo;

queries.name: ListClearancePermit Query
Occupation Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.Occupation, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.Occupation)=[TempVars]![strOccupationSelected]))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname;

queries.name: OccupationPurok Query
queries.sql:
SELECT HouseholdMembers.HseNum, HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.Occupation, HouseholdMembers.firstname, HouseholdMembers.middlename, HouseholdMembers.DATEOFBIRTH, HouseholdMembers.SEX, HouseholdMembers.PUROK
FROM HouseholdMembers
WHERE (((HouseholdMembers.Occupation)=TempVars!strOccupationSelected) And ((HouseholdMembers.PUROK)=TempVars!strSitioName))
ORDER BY HouseholdMembers.lastname, HouseholdMembers.firstname;
